channel.title: Index on smraisul03
channel.description: Recent content in Index on smraisul03

item.title: about.md
item.description:
Hello there!

This website purpose is for me to show some of my own eccentric side to the internet, and talk about topics that I want to post here. Some topics that I like to cover are related to my homelab, others are based upton my own sort of philosophical viewpoints on the internet. All in all everything here is based on my own opinions and are subject to discretion and professional showcase.
